task: I need a short reply I can send back to a vendor about an invoice issue. Can you draft something I can send as-is, with a blank where I can drop in the exact number or reference?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short reply you can send as-is:

“Hi [Vendor Name], I’m reviewing the invoice and need clarification on the charge for [blank]. Please send the supporting paperwork and the specific basis for this amount so I can match it to the order/receiving records. Thanks.”

If you want, I can also make it firmer or more casual.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short, clear, and it asks for the paperwork. I can use that.
